spec_match.rationale: Exposes a full type-ramp (display down to small text size) scaling with the env variable.

interactive.rationale: Provides an interactive test bench slider to simulate system scaling between 0.7x and 2.5x.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Completely aligns with the feature's blurb and core objectives.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses different platforms gracefully, including a reset button to return to system defaults.

references.rationale: Cites the official spec draft and ChromeStatus entry link.

design_system.rationale: Complies with the showcase CSS variables and typography guidelines.

summary: A full-featured test bench for typography scaling that lets developers simulate the full spectrum of font-scaling options from 0.7x to 2.5x while contrasting proportional and text-only card rendering side-by-side.
